hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *graphify*) ;; *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*) [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Advisory: a knowledge graph covers this repo (graphify-out/). For code-exploration questions, `graphify query \"<question>\"` returns a scoped subgraph and is often cheaper than raw grep. Skip when grep is clearly the right tool (pinpoint edits, non-code files)."}}' || true ;; esac

HIT=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);t=d.get('tool_input',d);p=str(t.get('file_path') or t.get('path') or '').lower().replace(chr(92),'/');pat=str(t.get('pattern') or '').lower();src=any(x in (p+' '+pat) for x in ('inspecto/src','inspecto-ui/src','inspecto-agent','inspecto-connectors'));exts=('.java','.ts','.tsx','.html','.scss','.js','.py');sys.stdout.write('1' if src and 'graphify-out' not in p and (p.rstrip().endswith(exts) or bool(pat)) else '')" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$HIT" = 1 ] && [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Advisory: a knowledge graph covers this source (graphify-out/). For orientation / how-does-X-work questions, `graphify query \"<question>\"` or `graphify explain \"<concept>\"` gives a scoped subgraph cheaper than raw reads. Skip when editing or debugging specific lines."}}'; fi || true

hooks.statusMessage: Writing session snapshot for shift handover

hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreCompact\",\"additionalContext\":\"Context is about to be compacted. Before continuing, externalize anything important not yet in the repo: update SESSION_STATUS.local.md (current objective, active work, pending items, blockers, next steps), refresh affected docs/architecture/decision records, and write durable facts to memory. Refactor/dedup knowledge rather than appending. Do not rely on conversation history surviving \u2014 the repo is the source of truth.\"}}"
hooks.statusMessage: Reminding to persist knowledge before compaction
